<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is a Vite + React frontend for browsing and displaying scraped Genius.com lyrics data. The UI should allow users to view artists, albums, and songs, and display lyrics in a user-friendly way. Data will be loaded from a local JSON file or API endpoint.
